evidenceBundles.title: Example independent research bundle
evidenceBundles.question: Will the example market resolve Yes?
evidenceBundles.thesis: Independent non-venue evidence supports a fair probability above the current execution threshold.

supportsYes.title: Official source supports the Yes case
supportsYes.summary: A primary source confirms a condition that materially increases the Yes probability.

supportsNo.title: Counter-case remains unresolved
supportsNo.summary: A remaining dependency could prevent the condition from resolving Yes.

openQuestions: Whether the remaining dependency resolves before the market end time.
